originalBehavior: The published Song Maker page boots a bundled canvas runtime that mounts the sequencer grid, top bar, bottom transport, and settings surfaces directly into the page body.
localStatus: The local route keeps that published bundled runtime and mount structure while replacing the broader Chrome shell with route-local metadata and the shared public footer.
notes: The archive build preserves the original canvas runtime rather than reauthoring Song Maker in a separate framework.
The route-local shell adds only the metadata header, local base handoff, and provenance footer.
evidence: The public route still mounts the published grid, top bar, and bottom control surfaces from the vendored bundle.
Music smoke coverage verifies the local bundle initializes and renders the interactive UI before note-entry checks begin.

originalBehavior: The published Song Maker experience loads first-party melodic and percussion sample packs, then uses them to drive playback from the painted sequencer grid.
localStatus: The local route archives those first-party media assets locally and keeps the same playback path so grid edits and transport changes still reflect local instrument banks.
notes: The route-local audio inventory is 110 archived audio files.
The bundled base constants are patched so loader assets resolve inside the local route tree rather than `/Song-Maker/`.
evidence: Implementation inventory captured the full local sample bank under the route tree before shipping.
Music smoke coverage verifies playback starts without remote playable media requests.

originalBehavior: The published page allows painting notes on the grid, changing settings like tempo and layout, and saving or sharing through a remote Song Maker service.
localStatus: The local route keeps grid editing, playback, and settings interactions while neutralizing remote save and share so the archive build does not expose a broken non-local flow.
notes: The public route swaps the save button for a disabled local-archive variant labeled `Save unavailable`.
Settings, play, instrument, and sequencer edit paths remain part of the shipped public route.
evidence: The local shell observes the runtime DOM and replaces the upstream save entrypoint after mount.
Music smoke coverage verifies one note-entry change, one playback-state change, and one settings change on the local route.

originalBehavior: The published Song Maker shell includes broader Google or Chrome surfaces, analytics glue, and route assumptions tied to the hosted `/Song-Maker/` root.
localStatus: The local route archives the first-party media locally, removes the broader shell and analytics surfaces from the public body, and leaves the shared footer as the only original-page reference surface.
notes: The shipped route archives 110 audio files, 20 images, and 2 font files inside the route tree.
A local MIDI shim is injected before boot so unsupported environments no longer throw an unhandled rejection during route initialization.
evidence: The docs contract records the exact local media counts required by the music-family archival policy.
The public-surface audit and music smoke group enforce footer-only provenance and zero remote playable media requests for this route.
